# cloudless_vm_configurations (Data Source)

All VM configurations (CPU/RAM presets) available for VM creation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudless_vm_configurations" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `configurations` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configurations))

<a id="nestedatt--configurations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configurations`

Read-Only:

- `cpu_families` (List of String)
- `dedicated` (Boolean)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `ram_gb` (Number)
- `slug` (String)
- `tags` (List of String)
- `vcpu` (Number)
